title: On Auction: Magnificent Pinnacle Point Home
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Dreaming of coastal luxury?...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Dreaming of coastal luxury? This magnificent home at 382 Bushbuck Drive in the prestigious Pinnacle Point Estate offers a 180-degree view of the Indian Ocean all year round.


> Going under the hammer on Wednesday, 10 September at 13:00 (live onsite and online), this property combines elegance and comfort with modern finishes, spacious living areas, and breathtaking surroundings.


- Auction of 382 Bushbuck Drive, Pinnacle Point Estate
- Wed. 10 September @ 13:00
- Live onsite & online auction
- Viewing by appointment: 3 & 9 September 12:00 – 13:00
- Call Frederick on 066 247 1374

Improvements:

- 3 Bedrooms (main is ensuite)
- 3.5 Bathrooms
- Kitchen
- Pantry, scullery & laundry
- Lounge
- Family/TV room
- Indoor braai / BBQ area
- Dining room
- Wine cellar
- Deck with splash pool
- 3 Garages
- 4 Outdoor parking spaces
- And more!

See more details here: https://bekkergroup.co.za/382-bushbuck-drive-pinnacle.../

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
